title: How to properly setup working "Install Missing Content" button

messages.content: # Here is how to set up “Install Missing Content” if it does not work.

## Step 1
> Open Content Manager and go to Settings.
> Click on the Content Manager tab.
> Find the "Downloading Content” section
## Step 2
> Make a new folder on the computer. **(except the C drive, where your Operating system is)**. Select it, and now your "install missing content" button will work.
